channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Happy Passion Pit Day, Boston!
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Happy Passion Pit Day, Boston!
item.content:encoded: Happy Passion Pit Day, Boston!

item.title: Album of the Day: Curió Curió, “Curió Curió.” On their stun…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Curió Curió, “Curió Curió.” On their stunning debut, the Brazilian-German duo take on themes of homesickness and belonging with tropical psychedelia.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Curió Curió, “Curió Curió.” On their stunning debut, the Brazilian-German duo take on themes of homesickness and belonging with tropical psychedelia.

item.title: Ferrell plays a zany former golf star who's trying to regain…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Ferrell plays a zany former golf star who's trying to regain his mojo in a new Netflix series. While The Hawk has its flaws, it delivers satisfying silliness, amusing shenanigans and surprise cameos. n.pr/4fCiXEN
item.content:encoded: Ferrell plays a zany former golf star who's trying to regain his mojo in a new Netflix series. While The Hawk has its flaws, it delivers satisfying silliness, amusing shenanigans and surprise cameos. n.pr/4fCiXEN

item.title: The 2026 edition of Moscow-based electronic music festival O…
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: The 2026 edition of Moscow-based electronic music festival Outline has been cancelled following fears of drone strikes in the area
item.content:encoded: The 2026 edition of Moscow-based electronic music festival Outline has been cancelled following fears of drone strikes in the area

item.title: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched retaliatory attacks on U.S. targets in the Gulf, as President Trump said he was close to deciding whether to launch "a massive attack." n.pr/4wn4rbh
item.content:encoded: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched retaliatory attacks on U.S. targets in the Gulf, as President Trump said he was close to deciding whether to launch "a massive attack." n.pr/4wn4rbh

item.title: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebel…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attacked two Saudi tankers in the Red Sea. And, President Trump overnight replaced expiring tariffs with a slew of new ones. n.pr/4wn4DHv
item.content:encoded: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attacked two Saudi tankers in the Red Sea. And, President Trump overnight replaced expiring tariffs with a slew of new ones. n.pr/4wn4DHv

item.title: Tomorrowland has put limitations on pyrotechnics and halted …
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: Tomorrowland has put limitations on pyrotechnics and halted all large-scale fireworks amid wildfire warnings for its second weekend
item.content:encoded: Tomorrowland has put limitations on pyrotechnics and halted all large-scale fireworks amid wildfire warnings for its second weekend

item.title: Ascend West Virginia is one of dozens of relocation initiati…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Ascend West Virginia is one of dozens of relocation initiatives across the country offering cash and other incentives to move to states needing an economic boost. Here's how they're working out. n.pr/4vRiMM7
item.content:encoded: Ascend West Virginia is one of dozens of relocation initiatives across the country offering cash and other incentives to move to states needing an economic boost. Here's how they're working out. n.pr/4vRiMM7

item.title: The administration timed a new set of tariffs on all of its …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The administration timed a new set of tariffs on all of its largest trading partners to take effect at the same time the old, global tariff ended. n.pr/4bTGZtJ
item.content:encoded: The administration timed a new set of tariffs on all of its largest trading partners to take effect at the same time the old, global tariff ended. n.pr/4bTGZtJ

item.title: 【ライブレポート】 Saucy Dogが半年ぶりライブ開催 愛と感謝にあふれたひさびさワンマン 「居場所やなっ…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:

item.title: A Supreme Court ruling stripped Haitian migrants of their te…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A Supreme Court ruling stripped Haitian migrants of their temporary legal status. Those with U.S.-born children face an agonizing choice if deported: Should they take them to a still-dangerous Haiti? n.pr/4wkzbcZ
item.content:encoded: A Supreme Court ruling stripped Haitian migrants of their temporary legal status. Those with U.S.-born children face an agonizing choice if deported: Should they take them to a still-dangerous Haiti? n.pr/4wkzbcZ
